MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by David Kim.
Attorney, Michael Rossoff, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Vincent Beaulieu, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang, representing the defendant through limited scope.
Judge Wiley, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 624, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-23-2010 is vacated.
